_comment: VIA-importable definition for the Codex Micro running Claude Code. This is a best-effort skeleton pending Milestone 0 confirmation of the pad's VID/PID and matrix. Update `vendorId`/`productId`/`matrix` from `freemicro detect --json` once the hardware is in hand, then load at https://usevia.app.
name: Codex Micro (FreeMicro / Claude Code)
